arts.ttl: England's Tuchel holds talks with Foden, Rashford
arts.sum: Thomas Tuchel has held constructive discussions with Marcus Rashford and Phil Foden after criticising their minimal impact on the wings against Albania.

arts.ttl: Thomas Tuchel fires Jude Bellingham warning over England role
arts.sum: Jude Bellingham will head back to Real Madrid next following a key week away on England duty under new boss Thomas Tuchel. Bellingham completed 90 minutes in a No.10 role in Tuchel’s first game in charge as England cruised to a 2-0 Wembley win over Albania. Tuchel has been brought in with the clear objective […] The post Thomas Tuchel fires Jude Bellingham warning over England role appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Gordon leaves England camp after 'worrying' injury
arts.sum: Anthony Gordon has withdrawn from the England squad after sustaining an injury in Friday's 2-0 victory against Albania.

arts.ttl: 'You can't': Declan Rice says what shouldn't happen with Lewis-Skelly because he's playing for England now
'The effort was there' - Tuchel on speaking to Foden & Rashford
arts.sum: England head coach Thomas Tuchel says he has spoken to Marcus Rashford and Phil Foden after Friday's win over Albania.

arts.ttl: Thomas Tuchel reveals talks with Marcus Rashford and Phil Foden after England's win over Albania
arts.sum: Three Lions boss also confirms Morgan Gibbs-White will likely be involved against Latvia

arts.ttl: Foden and Rashford know what is expected - Tuchel
arts.sum: England manager Thomas Tuchel praises Marcus Rashford and Phil Foden's effort and application but says he has spoken to the pair about what they need to offer on the ball, ahead of England's World Cup qualifier against Latvia.

arts.ttl: Thomas Tuchel has spoken to Phil Foden and Marcus Rashford about poor display
arts.sum: Both wide players struggled against Albania.

arts.ttl: Thomas Tuchel plans to keep England stars guessing after ditching Gareth Southgate tradition
arts.sum: England kickstarted the Thomas Tuchel reign with a 2-0 win over Albania at Wembley, but unlike under their previous manager, players had to wait before discovering who would feature

arts.ttl: Anthony Gordon 'unable to walk properly' as Thomas Tuchel issues injury update
arts.sum: England have been hit with an injury worry ahead of their second World Cup qualifier against Latvia on Monday evening with Thomas Tuchel having now spoken out on his potential starting XI
